# Tab Dock

> Tab Dock is a free, open-source browser extension for Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox
> that groups your open tabs by website into a macOS-style dock at the bottom of the
> browser window, so you can find and switch tabs instantly.

## Key facts

- Developer: Jean-Christophe VASSELON (https://github.com/JC144)
- Price: Free, open source
- Platforms: Chrome, Edge, Brave, Firefox
- Privacy: No tracking; all data stays on-device

## Pages

- [Official website](https://jc.vasselon.com/TabDockWebsite/): overview, features, how it works, install links
- [Source code](https://github.com/JC144/TabDockExtension): README and releases
- [Chrome Web Store listing](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/tab-dock/oahhjigfompaplkgjcpjccklggmamepc): install for Chrome, Edge, Brave
- [Firefox Add-on listing](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/tab-dock/): install for Firefox
